arts.ttl: Serie A | Monza v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: The U-Power Stadium is set to host an intriguing Serie A clash on Sunday as struggling Monza welcome high-flying Lazio. With contrasting form and ambitions, this match could prove pivotal for both sides as the season approaches its midway point. Lazio enter this fixture in scintillating form, having won their last five matches across all competitions. Their recent run of three consecutive Serie A victories has propelled them to 6th place, just three points off the summit. Marco Baroni’s men have been particularly prolific, netting 10 goals in their last three league outings. arts.ttl: Spalletti names Italy squad for Nations League matches against France and Belgium
arts.sum: Italy’s head coach Luciano Spalletti has announced his squad for the upcoming Nations League matches against Belgium and France, revealing some exciting new additions and the return of a key player. Among the highlights are the first call-ups for Fiorentina’s Pietro Comuzzo, Juventus’ Nicolò Savona, and Lazio’s Nicolò Rovella. These young talents will have the opportunity to showcase their skills on the international stage. A significant return to the national team is Nicolò Barella, who has been absent since the European Championship.
